name: modern-names
description: Foundry VTT module: modern name roll tables and namer macros

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:tests
scripts.startDevEnv: node scripts/sync-env-from-fvtt-config.js && node ci_scripts/install-quench.js && node ci_scripts/foundry-cache-snapshot.js && docker compose --project-directory docker --env-file .env up -d && node ci_scripts/install-quench.js && node ci_scripts/wait-for-foundry.js && RECORD_FOUNDRY_STATS=1 node ci_scripts/record-foundry-download.js --sync-badges
scripts.stopDevEnv: docker compose --project-directory docker --env-file .env down -v & docker container rm foundry-modern-names-test
scripts.pretest:ci: node ci_scripts/install-quench.js && node ci_scripts/restart-foundry-container.js && node ci_scripts/wait-for-foundry.js
